trending_videos.title: Scary Movie | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Marlon Wayans, Shawn Wayans, Anna Faris, Regina Hall
trending_videos.description:
We’re baaaaaack. Watch the official trailer for the new #ScaryMovie - only in theatres June 12. 

Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer (“Ghostface”), the Core Four are back in the killer’s crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe. Marlon Wayans (“Shorty”), Shawn Wayans (“Ray”), Anna Faris (“Cindy”), and Regina Hall (“Brenda”) reunite in Scary Movie alongside returning favorites and fresh faces to slash through reboots, remakes, requels, prequels, sequels, spin-offs, elevated horror, origin stories, anything with the word legacy in it, and every “final chapter” that absolutely isn’t final. Nothing is sacred. No trope survives. ​Every line gets crossed. The Wayans are back to cancel the Cancel Culture.

Connect with #ScaryMovie Online:
Website: https://www.scarymovie.film
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/scarymovie/
X: https://x.com/ScaryMovie
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ScaryMovie
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@scarymovie
Threads: https://

trending_videos.title: Apex Legends x Gundam Event Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Two Legendary universes collide as Gundam hits the Outlands March 10, bringing iconic weapons, Gundam-inspired cosmetics, and a reborn Broken Moon. Step into the endless waltz and fight with the power of a Gundam!

Get more info: https://www.ea.com/games/apex-legends/news/apex-gundam-event

Apex Legends™ is a free-to-play* battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation® 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Switch 2, and PC via EA App, Epic Games Store and Steam: http://x.ea.com/57366.

Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710
Follow us on X: https://twitter.com/playapex
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/
Follow us on TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@playapex/

Credits:
Production Company: Electronic Arts, Respawn Entertainment, CG by Brunch Studio, Gameplay capture & edit by Dark Burn Creative
Sound Design and Mix: Respawn Entertainment & Mass

trending_videos.description:
The parody franchise returns in Scary Movie 6 (2026).

Watch the official trailer featuring Marlon Wayans as the iconic comedy series takes aim at modern horror films once again. Packed with outrageous satire, unexpected cameos, and classic slapstick chaos, the sixth installment revives one of the most recognizable parody brands in film.

🔥 Horror parody returns
🔥 Marlon Wayans back in action
🔥 2026 comedy sequel

trending_videos.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Final Trailer | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
See you on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a

trending_videos.title: Fuerza Regida – caperuza (Letra)
trending_videos.description:
𝗦𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗲 𝘆 𝗮𝗽𝗼𝘆𝗮 𝗮 𝗙𝘂𝗲𝗿𝘇𝗮 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝗱𝗮ⵑ ↙️
• Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/artist/0ys2OFYzWYB5hRDLCsBqxt?si=AUxPmP85Q0yAV8MY2ROhEg
• Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFLI6KAjrKRtydD7KqiYvAw
• Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fuerzaregida/

⭐️𝗟𝗘𝗧𝗥𝗔:
Te busco y no estás
Le llamé a tu mamá, y me dijo que te fuiste con amigas
Saliste de fiesta para olvidarte de todas mis mentiras
Te fuiste de viaje, pisteaste, pecaste
Qué feo la cagaste, ma
Tú no eres así, tú no eres feliz

Este amor que es anormal
Caperuza, ¿dónde estás?
Porfa, no te escondas más
Soy tu lobo, animal
Pregunta tu papá: "Cabrón, ¿qué le hiciste a mi niña?"
Si supiera, viejón, que me hizo chivo su niña

Chale, ya se apagó la llama
Desde esa noche van tres noches que no llama
Yo llamé y llamé y tú estabas con otro güey
Ya valió verga, que no vamos a volver

Este amor que es anormal
Caperuza, ¿dónde estás?
Porfa, no te escondas más
Soy tu lobo, animal
Pregunta tu papá: "Cabrón, ¿qué le hiciste a mi niña?"
Si sup

movies_and_entertainment.description: Movie trailers and entertainment content are showing significant traction. Notably, 'Scary Movie' series is prominent with two related videos, indicating high audience interest in new releases and sequels.

insights.audience_engagement: High engagement is likely due to nostalgia and an established fan base for the 'Scary Movie' franchise.
insights.market_opportunity: Consider creating content around movie reviews, behind-the-scenes, or fan theories to leverage the interest in upcoming films.

gaming.description: Gaming content, especially collaborations like 'Apex Legends x Gundam Event Trailer', is trending.

insights.audience_engagement: High potential for engagement through interactive and live content formats.
insights.market_opportunity: Explore opportunities in live streaming, event hosting, or exclusive game previews to capture the gaming audience.

live_streaming_and_vlogs.description: Live streaming content, such as '🔴LIVE | ARC NUTTERS', is gaining traction, showcasing a trend towards interactive and real-time content consumption.

insights.market_opportunity: Develop content strategies that include regular live sessions or vlogs to foster community and increase viewer retention.

diverse_content.description: Creators are producing a wide range of content from movie trailers to live streams and music videos.

insights.content_variety: Opportunities exist for cross-genre content creation that can tap into multiple audience interests.
insights.engagement_strategy: Creators should experiment with different content types to understand audience preferences better.

branded_channels.description: Brands like Paramount Pictures and FOX News are utilizing YouTube for promotional content.

insights.branding_opportunity: Brands can leverage YouTube to release trailers, teasers, and promotional content to drive audience anticipation.
insights.partnership_potential: Potential for partnerships between brands and influential creators to expand reach and engagement.

content_collaborations.description: Collaborative content, such as 'Apex Legends x Gundam', presents opportunities for cross-industry synergy.

insights.cross-promotion: Explore partnerships with different industries (e.g., gaming and anime) to create content that appeals to broader audiences.
insights.innovative formats: Consider integrating interactive elements or augmented reality experiences in collaborative content.

nostalgia-driven_content.description: Content that taps into nostalgia, such as sequels of popular series, is highly engaging.

insights.audience_retention: Leverage nostalgia by revisiting popular past themes or franchises in new content.
insights.content_revival: Opportunity to create 'where are they now' or retrospective content that capitalizes on this trend.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
